summary: Phase 3 CRO/UX optimization testing completed. All requested features are working correctly: hero text not overlapped by header, differentiator subtitle visible, social media icons in header and footer with correct URLs, blog share buttons functional, mobile sticky CTA with Call Now and Request Quote buttons, Open Graph meta tags including og:image configured.

issues:
Blog content displays raw HTML tags (e.g.,

Introducere

...) instead of rendered HTML - content is not being parsed/rendered properly
design_issues.note: Not part of Phase 3 scope but noticed during testing

passed_tests: Hero text NOT overlapped by header - 270px+ gap between navbar bottom and hero content
Differentiator subtitle visible below main headline: 'Specialists in Legal Non-EU Recruitment, IGI Procedures and Complete Immigration Solutions for Companies and Individuals.'
Social media icons visible in header top bar (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
Blog post share buttons present: Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Copy Link
Mobile sticky CTA visible at bottom of viewport (y=760px)
Call Now button has green styling and correct tel:+40732403464 href
Request Quote button has coral styling
Open Graph meta tags configured including og:image
Twitter Card meta tags configured including twitter:image
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix blog post content rendering - HTML tags are displayed as text instead of being rendered
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPostPage.jsx line 256-258: Content is rendered using split('\n') and plain text, but content contains HTML tags that should be rendered using dangerouslySetInnerHTML or a markdown parser
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 CRO/UX features verified working. Hero padding fix confirmed (270px+ gap). Social icons in header and footer with correct URLs. Blog share buttons functional. Mobile sticky CTA positioned correctly with Call Now (green) and Request Quote (coral) buttons. OG meta tags including og:image configured. One minor issue: blog content shows raw HTML tags instead of rendered content.

hero_text_overlap_fix.details: Navbar height: 228px, Hero differentiator at y=498px, Hero title at y=562px. Gap of 270px+ ensures no overlap.

differentiator_subtitle.text_en: Specialists in Legal Non-EU Recruitment, IGI Procedures and Complete Immigration Solutions for Companies and Individuals.

mobile_sticky_cta.position: Fixed at bottom of viewport (y=760px on 812px viewport)
